headlines.title: Chris Mason: Starmer ally takes swipe at Burnham's first big policy
headlines.description: Sir Keir Starmer's former right hand man Darren Jones says Andy Burnham's VAT cut is unfunded.

headlines.title: Who's in Andy Burnham's cabinet?
headlines.description: An in-depth look at which Labour MPs have been appointed to cabinet roles by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham

headlines.title: Cause of Ann Widdecombe's death yet to be established, inquest hears
headlines.description: The 78-year-old was found with "visible injuries" at her home in Devon on 9 July.

headlines.title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
headlines.description: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

headlines.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
headlines.description: Iran says it has hit two ships in the Strait of Hormuz as well as targets in Bahrain and Jordan.

headlines.title: Is UK facing drought for second summer in a row?
headlines.description: The longest dry spell in over 30 years for central England raises concerns about drought and when it might rain.

headlines.title: Watch: 'My flat was turned into a brothel,' landlord tells BBC Panorama
headlines.description: A Panorama investigation uncovers how organised gangs are exploiting the UK's private rental market.

headlines.title: Russian warship carried out firing exercise off Plymouth coast
headlines.description: The Neustrashimy's live-fire exercise took place in international waters and lasted for 30 minutes.

headlines.title: Thames Water lenders offer 'golden share' to head off nationalisation
headlines.description: The water supplier's lenders are trying to prevent the company from being taken over by the Burnham government

headlines.title: Fifa opens investigation into Argentina post-final trouble
headlines.description: Argentina will face an investigation into the ugly scenes at the end of the World Cup final, Fifa has confirmed.

headlines.title: UK borrowing falls in June but public finances remain a challenge
headlines.description: Public finances for last month were better than expected but the UK is carrying major debt.

headlines.title: What does an Andy Burnham-led government mean for your money?
headlines.description: The new PM says he will look at how much people can earn before paying tax but admitted changing it would be difficult.

headlines.title: Evan Davies: Why the new PM will find it so tricky to unite Britain
headlines.description: Is there any common ground left?

headlines.title: Louise Haigh: Labour power broker behind PM's rise
headlines.description: The Sheffield MP's return to the cabinet comes after she emerged as one of the PM's key political allies.

headlines.title: Key takeaways from Andy Burnham's first day as PM
headlines.description: The new Labour leader has formally taken office and set out his priorities for power in No 10.

headlines.title: Your tips on getting a fussy child to eat, and six recipes they might love
headlines.description: Want to avoid battles over broccoli and squabbles over spinach? We've asked you for your advice on how to cope at mealtimes over the summer holidays.

headlines.title: Does Scotland have the 'game changer' helicopters it needs to fight wildfires?
headlines.description: A devastating wildfire burning in the Cairngorms has entered its seventh day, as helicopters battle to help stop the spread of the flames.

headlines.title: Bumblebees are struggling in UK heatwaves - but you can help them
headlines.description: The furry bodies of UK bumblebees are specially adapted for cold weather - making heatwaves a struggle.

headlines.title: 'I made £100,000 of TikTok sales in one day': The business of live shopping
headlines.description: Buying on social media livestreams is fast becoming regular consumer behaviour for many.

headlines.title: Misleading posts about Trump at World Cup final viewed by millions
headlines.description: Some of the most viral posts focus on US President Donald Trump and Spain's wonderkid Lamine Yamal.

headlines.title: The 20-somethings betting big on tech stocks
headlines.description: The BBC hears from people about the risks and rewards of investing in technology shares.

headlines.title: Will the Tate brothers be extradited from the US to the UK?
headlines.description: Andrew and Tristan Tate are set to face extradition proceedings in the US as British prosecutors issued 38 new charges against the brothers.

headlines.title: India's 'cockroach' protest continues a day after police crackdown
headlines.description: Delhi witnessed overwhelming violence on Monday, with at least 60 protesters wounded. Police said 118 of their men were also injured.

headlines.title: Monkey abandoned in laundry bag on London bus
headlines.description: A marmoset monkey is rescued by animal welfare officers on the 302 service in north-west London.

headlines.title: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
headlines.description: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.

headlines.title: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
headlines.description: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.

headlines.title: Northern Ireland's deputy first minster was 'floored' by news of Donaldson arrest
headlines.description: The deputy first minister says people who worked alongside Jeffrey Donaldson are "floored, shocked and utterly repulsed".

headlines.title: 'Anti-ICE' army veteran started fire outside Manhattan federal building, say officials
headlines.description: Andrew Arrabaca, 43, was armed with two axes, a machete, three knives and fireworks, says the FBI.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Bertha threatens US Gulf coast
headlines.description: Storm surges up to 4ft are possible along parts of the Louisiana and Mississippi coasts, officials say.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Newscast
headlines.description: Andy Burnham makes John Healey his chancellor as he assembles his cabinet.

headlines.title: Who is the new PM?
headlines.description: From Manchester mayor to prime minister; who is he and what does stand for?

headlines.title: Get inside access to the new super-elite: The tech billionaires
headlines.description: Matt Shea meets the new tech billionaires trying to reshape the world.

headlines.title: Bournemouth midfielder Scott rejects new contract
headlines.description: Bournemouth midfielder Alex Scott rejects a new contract amid growing Premier League interest in the England international.

headlines.title: Fifa opens investigation into Argentina post-final trouble - what happens next?
headlines.description: Argentina will face an investigation into the ugly scenes at the end of the World Cup final, Fifa has confirmed.

headlines.title: Why was Hamilton penalised but not Leclerc? - F1 Q&A
headlines.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions before the Hungarian Grand Prix.

headlines.title: The country that doesn't play football ... yet
headlines.description: Nauru is the only nation to have never played an official international football match and hardly anyone there plays the game. Is that about to change?

headlines.title: Ex-Villa striker Duran joins seventh club aged 22
headlines.description: Former Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran joins Benfica on a season-long loan from Saudi Arabian side Al-Nassr.

headlines.title: Earl wants changes to 'brutal' Nations Championship format
headlines.description: Ben Earl calls for a change to the Nations Championship format after England's "brutal" schedule in the summer leg of the inaugural competition.

headlines.title: Humphries suffers shock first-round exit at Matchplay
headlines.description: World number two Luke Humphries is out of the World Matchplay after a shock first-round loss to Scotland's Cameron Menzies.
